name: Chambord Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chocolate wafer or graham crumb
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix crumbs, 2 tablespoons sugar, and melted butter together. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes; cool.
3. Heat oven to 300°F.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add 1 cup sugar and continue beating until fluffy.
5. Add vanilla extract, raspberry jam, and raspberry liqueur to the mixture. Beat in eggs one at a time.
6. Pour the batter over the crumb crust.
7. Bake for about 1 hour or until the center is firm. Let cool to room temperature.
8. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours but no more than 10 days before serving. Loosen the edge of the cheesecake with a knife before removing from the pan.
